# projectbluefin/actions — Copilot Instructions

> This file is a pointer-only wrapper. Do not add content here — all knowledge lives in `docs/skills/`. Update skills there, not here.

Read [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) and [`docs/SKILL.md`](../docs/SKILL.md) before doing anything.

---

## What this repo is

A collection of shared composite GitHub Actions for bootc image builders. All actions live under `bootc-build/<name>/action.yml`. Consumed by bluefin, aurora, bazzite, and other ublue-os repos via `projectbluefin/actions/bootc-build/<name>@v1`.

Full authoring reference: [`docs/skills/composite-actions.md`](../docs/skills/composite-actions.md)
